---
name: Country preset update
about: Suggest an update to a country preset
title: "[Country preset]: "
labels: country-preset
---

## Country preset

Which country preset is being updated? (e.g., brazil_clt, usa_federal, uk_standard)

## Field to update

Which field(s) need to be changed? (e.g., total_employer_tax_rate, vacation_days_per_year, benefits)

## Current value

What is the current value in the preset?

## Proposed value

What should the new value be?

## Source

Where does this data come from? (e.g., official government site, tax authority, labor organization, research paper)

## Last updated date

When was this data last verified?

## Notes

Any additional context, caveats, or nuances about this value. For example, regional variations, sector-specific rules, or recent legislative changes.

## Is this still an editable estimate?

- [x] Yes, this value remains an editable educational estimate and should not be treated as legal, tax, or accounting advice.

> **Important:** Country presets are educational estimates. They do not replace professional legal, tax, accounting, or labor advice.
